summary: This document is a pitch deck for KeepMeCompany, an AI health-tech startup offering pre-appointment medical calls for elderly patients in NHS GP practices. It outlines the business model, market size, product certification (Class I Medical Device), and current funding status seeking £1.2M investment. The deck highlights pilot progress with a PCN and competitive advantages over traditional forms and scribes.
